overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a rainy urban street at night in a video game environment. The camera moves steadily along a wet sidewalk past commercial storefronts including a loan shop and Subway restaurant, approaching an intersection where the traffic light changes from red to green.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past trash bags and discarded tires

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow urban sidewalk at night, passing discarded tires and trash bags. A pedestrian in a brown coat walks past on the right and exits view. The Payback Time loan store is visible on the right with its purple illuminated signage, while street lamps cast reflections on the wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the Subway restaurant entrance

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with green and yellow illuminated signage
blue USPS postal collection box on the sidewalk
newspaper vending machine near the Subway entrance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the wet sidewalk past the Subway restaurant with its bright green signage. A blue USPS mailbox stands on the left near the curb. The street transitions from the loan shop area to the Subway storefront, with the sidewalk remaining narrow and enclosed by buildings.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and entering the crosswalk as the light changes to green

entered.detail: traffic signal suspended over intersection showing red then changing to green
yellow diamond-shaped pedestrian crossing warning sign
multi-story building with illuminated windows across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with a crosswalk. The traffic light changes from red to green as the camera approaches. A yellow pedestrian crossing sign is visible on the left, and a lit building stands across the street. The space transitions from enclosed sidewalk to open intersection with partial sky visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-slicked urban sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide city intersection. It begins by moving past discarded tires and trash bags under the purple glow of a Payback Time loan store, while a pedestrian in a brown coat brushes past on the right. As the camera continues forward, the environment shifts from the loan shop to the bright green signage of a Subway restaurant, passing a blue USPS mailbox stationed by the curb. The narrow, enclosed feeling of the storefronts then gives way to an expansive urban crossing as the camera approaches a yellow pedestrian sign. Finally, the scene opens up toward a lit building across the street just as the traffic light transitions from red to green.
